fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket board help surfaces one canonical flag shape that matches the common ticket-cli conventions for agent, file list, and rename arguments. 2. Backward-compatible parsing remains available for any previously documented board flag spellings that differ from the canonical shape. 3. Focused CLI tests cover the canonical help text and at least one compatibility alias path.

fields.implementation_summary: Canonicalized ticket board flag naming around the common ticket-cli forms: board help now shows --agent, repeated --file, --ttl-secs, and --from/--to, while the parser keeps --agent-id, --files, --ttl, --old-path, and --new-path as compatibility aliases. Added focused CLI regressions for help text and alias parsing, and updated the shared ticket-system instruction examples to the canonical form.
fields.title: [ticket-cli] Canonicalize board subcommand option naming
fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-05-26: cargo test -p ticket-cli board_help_uses_canonical_common_flag_names --test integration_board_cli -- --nocapture passed; cargo test -p ticket-cli board_long_form_aliases_still_parse --test integration_board_cli -- --nocapture passed; spec refs validate passed for ddac3853-65b3-4b6b-b216-81e78e250bb1 with workspace_root memory-viewers/memory-api.
